L1.head: Advanced structural biology techniques (X-ray crystallography, cryogenic electron microscopy)
L1.claim: 结构生物学技术揭示了GPCR的构象动力学

L1.head: conformational dynamics of GPCRs
L1.tail: accessibility and shape of allosteric drug binding sites
L1.claim: 构象动力学影响别构药物结合位点的可及性和形状

L1.head: integration of molecular dynamics simulations with structural analyses
L1.tail: identification of novel therapeutic targets and drug development
L1.claim: 整合模拟与结构分析可增强新靶点发现和药物开发

L1.head: understanding of conformational changes correlating with allosteric site dynamics
L1.tail: design of molecules stabilizing beneficial receptor states
L1.claim: 理解构象变化可指导设计稳定有益受体状态的分子

L1.head: design of stabilizing molecules
L1.claim: 稳定分子设计可提高药物效果和选择性

L2.head: integration of X-ray crystallography and cryogenic electron microscopy with molecular dynamics simulations
L2.tail: comprehensive view of GPCR conformational transitions
L2.claim: 多模态方法提供GPCR构象转变的全面视图

L2.head: comprehensive view of conformational transitions
L2.tail: mechanisms of local 'breathing' motions activating signaling pathways
L2.claim: 全面视图阐明局部运动激活信号通路的机制

L2.head: elucidation of activation mechanisms
L2.tail: new allosteric sites for therapeutic intervention
L2.claim: 机制解析可揭示新的治疗靶向别构位点

L2.head: molecular dynamics simulations
L2.tail: effects of membrane lipid variations on GPCR conformational flexibility
L2.claim: 模拟可预测膜脂变化对GPCR柔性的影响

L2.head: simulations of different lipid compositions
L2.claim: 不同脂质模拟可识别促进开放位点的条件

L2.head: identification of promoting conditions
L2.claim: 条件识别可增强别构调节剂效果

L3.head: combination of X-ray crystallography, cryogenic electron microscopy, and molecular dynamics simulations
L3.tail: construction of predictive model linking GPCR states to allosteric sites
L3.claim: 技术组合可构建构象-别构位点关联模型

L3.head: predictive model
L3.claim: 模型可指导别构调节剂的理性设计

L3.head: allosteric modulators stabilizing desired conformations
L3.claim: 稳定构象的调节剂可关联预期药理效应

L3.head: detailed molecular dynamics simulations in various lipid environments
L3.tail: role of specific lipids in modulating receptor flexibility
L3.claim: 详细模拟可揭示特定脂质对受体柔性的调控

L3.head: findings on lipid roles
L3.tail: experimental protocols for optimizing drug delivery systems
L3.claim: 脂质作用发现可转化为递送系统优化方案

L3.head: optimized lipid composition in delivery vehicles
L3.claim: 优化脂质组成可维持靶受体最佳构象
